title: Ouch!
description: The Rutle’s second film which finds the group running from a murderous cult.
parent: The Rutles: All You Need is Cash
altHero: the Rutles making letter shapes with their bodies
alt1: the Rutles performing in a desert oasis
alt2: the Rutles jumping all together in a sand dune
alt3: the Rutles riding a beach boat car while a native woman runs after them
alt4: the Rutles sitting in the sand saying “Ouch!”
